user:
def mini_dictionary():     dictionary = {}      while True:         print("
--- 📖 MINI DICTIONARY ---")         print("1. Look up a word")         print("2. Add or update a word")         print("3. Delete a word")         print("4. Show all words")         print("5. Exit")          choice = input("Enter your choice (1-5): ")          if choice == '1':             word = input("
Enter word to search: ").strip().lower()             if word in dictionary:                 print(f"{word.capitalize()}: {dictionary[word]}")             else:                 print(f"Sorry, '{word}' is not in the dictionary.")          elif choice == '2':             word = input("
Enter the new word: ").strip().lower()             definition = input("Enter the definition: ").strip()             dictionary[word] = definition             print(f"'{word.capitalize()}' added successfully!")          elif choice == '3':             word = input("
Enter word to delete: ").strip().lower()             if word in dictionary:                 del dictionary[word]                 print(f"'{word.capitalize()}' has been deleted.")             else:                 print(f"Word '{word}' not found.")          elif choice == '4':             print("
--- ALL WORDS ---")             if not dictionary:                 print("Dictionary is currently empty.")             else:                 for key, value in dictionary.items():                     print(f"- {key.capitalize()}: {value}")          elif choice == '5':             print("
Goodbye!")             break          else:             print("Invalid choice. Please enter a number between 1 and 5.")  if __name__ == "__main__":     mini_dictionary()
